HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering
 
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
Class List
Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:
 CBsp3DMinimal 3D BSP tree for triangle meshes
 CbspPolygonPolygon wrapper carried through BSP splitting
 CCLFlagBoolean flag option with no argument
 CCLOptionTyped option expecting a value (e.g., "-th 8", "-l 2")
 CCLParserAbstract base for all command-line option parsers
 CCLStringOptionOption that captures a string argument
 CCoeffsInterInterpolation coefficients of the inter-layer interactions of Green's function
 CCoeffsIntraInterpolation coefficients of the intra-layer interactions of Green's function
 CData2DStructure representing the 2D spatial data used for tabulation in a layered medium
 CData3DStructure representing the 3D spatial data used for tabulation in a layered medium
 CDipolePoint electric dipole excitation
 CDomainAbstract base class for domains
 CDomainHom3DConcrete domain for homogeneous 3D media
 CDomainHom3DPerHomogeneous medium with Bloch‑periodic excitation/Green's function
 CDomainLayered3D3D stratified (layered) medium domain
 CedgeMesh edge record (unique and unoriented for membership; oriented for vectors)
 CGaussianParaxial Gaussian beam illumination (homogeneous medium)
 CGaussQuadGaussian-quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields
 CGreenFAbstract base for Green's function kernels
 CGreenFHom3DFree‑space (homogeneous) Green's function provider
 CGreenFHom3DPerBase class for homogeneous 3D Green's functions with lattice periodicity
 CGreenFHom3DPer2D2D‑periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with Ewald acceleration
 CGreenFLayered3DLayered background Green's function with tabulation and D/K/delta/kappa integrals
 CGridStructure representing the grid points used for tabulation in a layered medium
 CIncidentFieldAbstract base for incident fields (excitations) used in SIE
 CIntegrandInterStructure representing the integrand of the inter-layer interactions of Green's function
 CIntegrandIntraStructure representing the integrand of the intra-layer interactions of Green's function
 CJobParserStreaming, stack-based reader for simple tag-delimited job files
 ClayeredCoordsStructure representing stratified coordinates in a layered medium
 CLayeredMediaUtilsUtility class for calculations related to layered media
 CLookupTableRepresents a 2D lookup table for complex functions (text format)
 CLookupTableBinRepresents a 2D lookup table for complex functions (binary format)
 CPlaneWaveModels a plane wave as an incident field in homogeneous or layered media
 CPositionGroupStructure representing a group of spatial positions categorized by layer indices
 CRangeStructure representing the spatial ranges in a layered medium tabulation
 CRWGFunRWG basis function tied to a mesh triangle
 CSIEFormAbstract base class for SIE formulations
 CSIEFormPMCHWPMCHWT formulation for SIE in homogeneous and layered media
 CSimJobHigh-level driver for SIE simulations and field evaluation
 CSingCancellationBuilds synchronized quadrature nodes/weights for a pair of touching triangles
 CSingSubAnalytic helpers for singularity subtraction on a single triangle
 CSommerfeldIntegratorNumerical engine for Sommerfeld integrals in stratified media
 CSurfaceMeshLightweight surface mesh container with file I/O and BC helpers
 CSymmetryOperationAbstract base class for spatial symmetry operations
 CTranslationConcrete translation symmetry operation
 CTriangleTriangular surface element with cached geometry and utilities
 CTriQuadPolPolar \((\rho, \theta)\) quadrature generator on a triangular facet
